note: LOTTERY AUDIT panel added inside DTD section. Calls new getlotteryaudit RPC per PAYOUT block and shows: block, miner, on-chain winner, re-derived audit winner, winner_index, eligible_count, seed (sha256 of domain || 16 prev block hashes || height_le), cooldown addresses, MATCH/MISMATCH. Lets anyone reproduce lottery selection from public chain data and detect tampering. Also v143: BLOCK LAG cascade hint surfaces V12 triangular extension. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
